name: profile-int4
description: claudecode: decode op-time profiler on the official QAT W4A16 int4 leader. Not a server — loads the model, runs single-stream decode under torch.profiler (enforce_eager for per-kernel attribution), prints a categorized CUDA-time breakdown (attention/MLP-Marlin/sampling-262k/norm/...) to job_logs and /state, then exits. Sizes the ~33% overhead gap to pick a kernel target. Full multimodal retained (no modality disabled).
